name: Qosic
description: Qosic (QOSPAY) is a West African payment aggregator for mobile money collection, disbursement and card checkout. This spec set covers Togo (Togocel / Yas and Moov Togo). Qosic also supports Benin (MTN, Moov, Celtiis) and card payments via a separate Checkout product not covered here.
example_prompt: Add Qosic / QOSPAY to my Togolese app so I can collect mobile money payments from Togocel and Moov customers and disburse payouts to mobile money numbers.
